---
title: "Compulsory Assignment 1"
subtitle: "Predictive Analytics (KAN-CDSCO1005U)"
author: "Alejandro Gato, Alexander Myrup, Pontus Neumann, Linus Yu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Student Information

**Names:** Alejandro Gato, Alexander Myrup, Pontus Neumann, Linus Yu  
**Student IDs:** 185912, 161989, 160714 & 160363  
**Dataset:** USMacroG

---

## Setup: Installing and Loading Packages
```{r packages}
# install.packages("AER")
# install.packages("fpp3")

library(AER)
library(fpp3)
```

---

## Question 1: GDP Level — Plot and ACF
```{r load-data}
data("USMacroG", package = "AER")
gdp <- USMacroG[, "gdp"]
```
```{r gdp-plot}
plot(gdp, main = "US Real GDP (1950–2000)", ylab = "Billion USD", xlab = "Year")
```
```{r gdp-acf}
acf(gdp, main = "ACF of US Real GDP")
```

---

## Question 2: GDP Growth Rate — Transformation, Plot, ACF, and Ljung-Box Test
```{r gdp-growth}
gdp_growth <- diff(log(gdp)) * 100  # Quarter-on-quarter growth rate in %
```
```{r growth-plot}
plot(gdp_growth, main = "US Real GDP Growth Rate (QoQ)", ylab = "Growth Rate (%)", xlab = "Year")
```
```{r growth-acf}
acf(gdp_growth, main = "ACF of GDP Growth Rate")
```
```{r ljung-box}
Box.test(gdp_growth, lag = 12, type = "Ljung-Box")
```
